subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath triumphed through the splendours of guidance, when the Lord of the Throne and of earth came with a sovereignty that conquered all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الهدی اذ اتی مالک العرش و الثری بسلطان غلب من فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
